errors.incompleteCredentialsDescription: Enter email and password to continue.
errors.googleSignInFailedTitle: Unable to sign in with Google

login.resetPasswordSuccessDescription: You can now sign in with your new password.
login.heroDescription: Access your preparation dashboard and continue where you left off. Your position is waiting.
login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to continue

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.description: We will send you a link to set a new password.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If an account exists for that email, you will receive a recovery link shortly.

errors.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
errors.network: Connection failed. Check your network and try again.
errors.generic: Unable to send the recovery email right now. Please try again.

resetPassword.heroDescription: Update your password to safely access your dashboard again.
resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter a secure password for your account.
resetPassword.hint: It must be at least {{min}} characters and match in both fields.

validation.length: Password must be at least {{min}} characters.

errors.invalidOrExpiredLink: This recovery link is invalid or expired. Request a new one.
errors.sameAsCurrent: Your new password must be different from your current password.
errors.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
errors.network: Connection failed. Check your network and try again.
errors.generic: Unable to update your password right now. Please try again.

validation.nameRequired: Complete first name and last name.
validation.emailAlreadyExists: An account already exists with that email.
validation.passwordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.invalidDateOfBirth: Enter a valid date of birth.
validation.termsRequired: You must accept terms and privacy to create your account.

toasts.emailCheckFailedDescription: We could not verify that email right now. Please try again.
toasts.createdDescription: Your account is ready. We are taking you to the next step.
toasts.checkEmailDescription: We sent you a confirmation link before access.
toasts.planContinuationFailedTitle: Unable to continue with the plan
toasts.planContinuationFailedDescription: Your account was created, but we could not complete the next plan step.

register.heroDescription: We create your account in a few steps and, if you already picked a plan, take you straight to the next action.
register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: We only ask for what is needed to get started.

plan.description: Choose how you want to start. You can change your plan later from your account.
plan.summaryDescription: You will start with {{aiLimit}} AI requests per day. Tests are available only if you choose Pro.

register.paymentCompletingDescription: Your payment is already confirmed. We are now creating your account and preparing the email so you can access it.
register.paymentErrorTitle: We could not complete the sign-up
register.paymentErrorDescription: The payment may have been processed, but we could not finish creating the account from here. Try again or go back to plan selection.
